title: Entity Healthbars: Hearts
description:
The pack where every entity has a healthbar!
Now with hearts!
body:
## The pack where every entity has a healthbar! Now with hearts!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/entity-healthbars-hearts)




[This addon requires the base pack!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/entity-healthbars) This pack adds healthbars to all of the entities that support OptiFine entity models! When you damage an entity, you can now see its health update live. You never need to wonder again if an entity is about to crush you, or almost dead!
